headline: Light AI reports Financial Results for Three Months and Year ended December 31, 2025
summary: Light AI Inc. ("Light AI" or the "Company") (CBOE CA: ALGO) (FSE: 0HC) (OTCQB: OHCFF), a digital healthcare technology company focused on developing artificial intelligence ("AI") health diagnostic solutions, today announced its financial and operating results for its fourth quarter of 2025 representing the three months and year ended December 31, 2025.
